label: Pi-Hub Cloud Bridge
info: Sendet Events an Pi-Hub Cloud. Setze die env-Werte unten (oder Tab-Properties) auf die Werte aus deinem Pi (siehe /integrations).

name: pi-hub cloud push
info:
Input: msg.payload = { component, device, status, message?, strategy_applied?, metrics, ts? }
Output: HTTP response (200 = cloud OK)

name: Build cloud request
pi-hub strategy poll
info: Output: msg.payload = { params, eco_paused, updated_at }. Trigger this every 10 min.

name: Build strategy request
